## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**civ-21 (excerpt):** - **Bible** as library (Greek *biblia* = books); Tanak = Torah + Nevi'im + Ketuvim; Hebrew Bible vs New Testament. - **Three myths corrected:** Jews not always monotheistic; Jewish history not continuous (Israelites ≠ Jews); Bible not historical record (archaeology finds no Abraham/Moses). - **Levant ~1200 BCE:** Canaan, Egypt province; Sea Peoples, Philistines; Saul elected king; David mercenary …
